title: 8 Sins Still Running a Godly Man's Life
caption:
The word "struggle" is where a man makes his peace with a sin that's supposed to be dead.

"Put to death, therefore, whatever belongs to your earthly nature." — Colossians 3:5

Not struggle with it. Not reduce it. Put it to death.

These eight don't feel dramatic. That's why they're still running. They're dressed just well enough to look manageable — the anger that's passion, the envy that's motivation, the laziness that's rest. But a sin that's running is a sin that's winning, even when you're still showing up to church.

Take an honest look. Name the one you've been calling a struggle.

Save this and send it to one man.

#faith #sin #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #repentance #scripture #colossians3 #christianity
